channel.title: Resident Advisor — Reviews
channel.description: Latest album, EP and single reviews from Resident Advisor

item.title: Mala & Magugu - Militant Don [Single]
item.description:
Mala & Magugu — Militant Don

Mala goes back to basics with heavyweight results.

Label: DMZ

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Beatrice M. - Midnight Swim [Single]
item.description:
Beatrice M. — Midnight Swim

Another hit from France's best hope for a modern day dubstep great.

Label: Tectonic Recordings

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Charlotte de Witte - Charlotte de Witte [Album]
item.description:
Charlotte de Witte — Charlotte de Witte

With a following like no other, Belgian techno queen Charlotte de Witte delivers a debut album that fails to leave an impression.

Label: Charlotte de Witte

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Debit - Desaceleradas [Album]
item.description:
Debit — Desaceleradas

Cumbia's slowed-down sub-genre gets a haunting twist in this ambient elegy to a Monterrey invention.

Label: Gabriel Dueñez

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: FKA twigs - EUSEXUA Afterglow [Album]
item.description:
FKA twigs — EUSEXUA Afterglow

EUSEXUA's follow-up explores the aftermath of ecstasy across naughties R&B, electroclash and garage-pop. It's sexy, spontaneous and a let down—by design.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Oneohtrix Point Never - Tranquilizer [Album]
item.description:
Oneohtrix Point Never — Tranquilizer

Drawing on once-ubiquitous digital sample packs from the turn of the millennium, Daniel Lopatin's latest album is a wonderland of decay.

Label: Internet Archive

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Eris Drew - DJ-Kicks: Eris Drew [Album]
item.description:
Eris Drew — DJ-Kicks: Eris Drew

This joyous DJ-Kicks teems with hope, showing why so many have come along on the Motherbeat journey.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Low End Activist - Airdrop II [Album]
item.description:
Low End Activist — Airdrop II

A personal and political archive of the darkest, forgotten corners of UK club music.

Label: video

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Mor Elian - Solid Space [Album]
item.description:
Mor Elian — Solid Space

The Fever AM cofounder ushers in the season of home-listening hibernation with a life-affirming bundle of IDM joy.

Label: show

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Shackleton - Euphoria Bound [Album]
item.description:
Shackleton — Euphoria Bound

Shackleton reasserts his singular vision of dance music with one of his most mind-melting records in recent memory.

Label: said

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Daphni - Butterfly [Album]
item.description:
Daphni — Butterfly

As Daphni, Dan Snaith feels increasingly stuck between what he wants to make and what he thinks his fans want to hear. His new LP hits neither marker convincingly.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Butter Sessions - 15 Years of Butter Sessions [Album]
item.description:
Butter Sessions — 15 Years of Butter Sessions

Three discs. 15 years. One glorious victory lap from the Naarm (Melbourne) label that keeps club music delightfully weird.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Excalibur and DJ Spence - Medium Rare [Single]
item.description:
Excalibur and DJ Spence — Medium Rare

Fatigued by the fast pace of algorithmic slop? Reach for this EP of unhurried perfection from one of minimal's best labels.

Label: Doo

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Peaches - No Lube So Rude [Album]
item.description:
Peaches — No Lube So Rude

New era, new genres, new battles: the queer icon's new LP is a balm for the frictions and contradictions of our world.

Label: Peaches

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Decoder - Prakasa [Album]
item.description:
Decoder — Prakasa

The Texan techno prodigy's new LP takes his prolific output to its full potential. The next step is precision over volume.

Label: Decoder

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Zora Jones - ANGEL CRISIS [Single]
item.description:
Zora Jones — ANGEL CRISIS

Zora Jones's first solo project in five years ushers in a new era with transformative, high-drama bass music.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: RHR - GÍRIA [Single]
item.description:
RHR — GÍRIA

Thrilling baile funk fusions from one of São Paulo's most compelling club whisperers.

Label: very clear

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Simo Cell & Abdullah Miniawy - Dying Is the Internet [Album]
item.description:
Simo Cell & Abdullah Miniawy — Dying Is the Internet

How can clubland reckon with online enshittification? Simo Cell and Abdullah Miniawy's latest collaborative LP looks for an answer through uncanny bass mutations.

Label: Deep Medi

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Avalon Emerson & the Charm - Written Into Changes [Album]
item.description:
Avalon Emerson & the Charm — Written Into Changes

Avalon Emerson's second LP is a self-assured, if slightly guarded, work that reveals new sides to her artistry.

Label: Avalon Emerson

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Various Artists - When There Is No Sun [Album]
item.description:
Various Artists — When There Is No Sun

The Ricardo Villalobos-curated Sun Ra remix compilation is an adventurous triumph that builds on the Arkestra's legacy and keeps its radical spirit in motion.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Robyn - Sexistential [Album]
item.description:
Robyn — Sexistential

Robyn's long-awaited ninth album perfects her formula for sentimental dance floor hits while expanding her electronic palette. It's also absurdly fun.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Various Artists - Djax-Up-Beats 1990-2005: Volume 1 - The Acid Trip [Album]
item.description:
Various Artists — Djax-Up-Beats 1990-2005: Volume 1 - The Acid Trip

The sound of '90s acid at full throttle, courtesy of one of its key architects.

Label: storied legacy

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Actress & Suzanne Ciani - Concrète Waves [Album]
item.description:
Actress & Suzanne Ciani — Concrète Waves

The two avant-garde titans' live album struggles to translate its in-room immersion, a pleasant listen that nevertheless sprawls and leaves you wanting more.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Boards of Canada - Tape 05 [Single]
item.description:
Boards of Canada — Tape 05

Warp's mysterious duo are back after 13 years. The surprise: it's some of their most beautiful work yet.

Label: YouTube upload

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: John Summit - CTRL ESCAPE [Album]
item.description:
John Summit — CTRL ESCAPE

Leading frat house's new wave, the US star serves up a second album packed with cheap thrills and little payoff.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Jump Source - Fold [Album]
item.description:
Jump Source — Fold

Priori and Patrick Holland have been on a tear, but their debut LP as Jump Source hits harder. It's one of the sharpest, best-built electronic albums you'll hear this year.

Label: Canadian house boom

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Loukeman - SD-3 [Album]
item.description:
Loukeman — SD-3

A restless collage of folk, pop, R&B and rap, stitched into emotionally charged electronics.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: james K - Friend Remixes [Album]
item.description:
james K — Friend Remixes

One of last year's best albums is recast into a set of aqueous club jams, anchored throughout by the precision of james K's voice.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Thaiboy Digital & swedm® - Paradise [Album]
item.description:
Thaiboy Digital & swedm® — Paradise

The Drain Gang mainstay's latest LP takes on big-room trance with aplomb.

Read full review on Resident Advisor →

item.title: Reptant - Ballet Robotique [Single]
item.description:
Reptant — Ballet Robotique

Ice-cold 808s from electro's new prince.

Label: X'trapolis

Read full review on Resident Advisor →
